'''Koth'lar''', alternatively rendered '''Koth-lar''', was a dim red [[Star/Legends|star]], and the [[Kothlis system/Legends|Kothlis system's]] primary. Only one of its seven [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Planet/Legends|planets]]—[[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]]—was habitable.

{{Star-stub}}
